fields.label: Collection Name
fields.value: Chugach State Park Ad Hoc Committee “Chugach State Park: a proposal,” circa 1969. UAA-EPH-0596

fields.label: Title
fields.value: Chugach State Park: a proposal, circa 1969.

fields.label: Description
fields.value: A pamphlet written by the Chugach Ad Hoc Committee, the Mountaineering Club of Alaska, and the Nordic Ski Club in support of the creation of a state park in the Anchorage area covering from Girdwood in the south to Eklutna in the north. The pamplet details the Committee's interest in creating the state park, the legislative means to establishing it, a map of the proposed boundaries, and some historical information about the location. To view the full text-searchable PDF, click on the download link or the expand button in the upper right of the image.
